tools.name: Node.js
communicationChannels: GitHub Actions warning messages in DX reusable workflows
tools.lifecyclePolicy: All active Node.js LTS versions are supported. Current (odd-numbered) releases are supported on a best-effort basis.

versions.notes: Current release, supported in pipelines and devcontainers
Vendor EOL reached — migrate to 22.x or 24.x

tools.name: Terraform
communicationChannels: GitHub Actions warnings/errors in terraform plan/apply reusable workflows
tools.lifecyclePolicy: Only the last two minor versions of the current major are actively supported in DX modules and pipelines.

versions.notes: Current stable, used in DX modules and pipelines
Supported — minimum required by most DX modules
No longer tested or supported in DX modules

tools.name: Terraform Providers
communicationChannels: GitHub Actions warnings/errors in terraform plan/apply reusable workflows
tools.lifecyclePolicy: Only the provider versions pinned in DX modules are actively supported. Check each module's required_providers block for the exact constraints.

versions.notes: Primary Azure provider used across core/resources/bootstrapper
Used in AWS modules and mixed-cloud stacks
Used where AWS Cloud Control resources are required

tools.name: Nx
communicationChannels: Nx task failure output in CI/CD logs when an unsupported Nx version is detected
tools.lifecyclePolicy: The latest major version is supported. Nx provides vendor support for 1 year per major release.

versions.notes: Current major — used in DX CLI, pipelines, and devcontainers

tools.name: Next.js
communicationChannels: Build-time warnings/errors in app pipelines when an unsupported Next.js version is used

tools.name: pnpm
communicationChannels: Installation and lockfile errors in CI logs when an unsupported pnpm version is detected
tools.lifecyclePolicy: The latest major version is supported. Upgrade to the latest major when available.

versions.notes: Current major — pinned via Corepack in DX monorepos
No longer supported in DX templates and workflows

tools.name: GitHub Actions (DX Reusable Workflows)
communicationChannels: Workflow warning messages and job summaries during pipeline execution
tools.lifecyclePolicy: Only the latest major version of each DX reusable workflow is supported. Breaking changes are communicated via version plan changelogs.

versions.notes: Each workflow is independently versioned — check individual changelogs for details
